The '''Yellow Demon 100 speeder bike''' was a popular two-seat [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] design created by the [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]] for the civilian market. The Yellow Demon employed a big [[QuietLift 1400]] propulsion system.
